name: The Quintessential Quintuplets - Honeymoon Arc
description:
"Wait, you come over too?"

It's after the School Fest, where Futaro proposed to Yotsuba, but you could change that to make her your girl if you want. The Honeymoon was planned by the Nakano sister for months and out of all sudden, Futaro invite you to come over since if they could go to his honeymoon, so does his friend.
creator: JustMangoDude
